announce_eyeofterror_flyaway.trans: 吓人的大眼睛害怕日光？哈哈哈！

announce_off_script.en: Ha, is wrong! This is funny to Wolfgang!
announce_off_script.trans: 哈，错了！沃尔夫冈觉得好玩！

announce_acidbats.en: Wolfgang not afraid. You are afraid.
announce_acidbats.trans: 沃尔夫冈不怕。害怕的是你。

announce_nohungersiesta.en: Wolfgang take siesta after eating time.
announce_nohungersiesta.trans: 沃尔夫冈只在吃过东西后午休。

1.en: Hello! Wolfgang will talk to you now.
1.trans: 你好！ 沃尔夫冈在跟你说话。

3.en: You will grow big and strong like Wolfgang!
3.trans: 你会像沃尔夫冈一样长得又大又壮!

4.en: You are very good plant. You make food for Wolfgang!
4.trans: 你是很好的植物。你将来是沃尔夫冈的食物！

5.en: Who is mightiest plant of all? You are!
5.trans: 谁是最强大的植物？就是你！

announce_hunt_lost_trail_spring.trans: 动物痕迹现在全成了泥浆。

announce_eating_not_feasting.en: Wolfgang should share with tiny, weaker friends.
announce_eating_not_feasting.trans: 沃尔夫冈该跟弱小的朋友们分享。

announce_enter_dark.en: I cannot see! I am scared!

announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.en: Wolfgang thinks furry friend wants to be followed.
announce_ticoon_get_leader_attention.trans: 沃尔夫冈认为毛茸茸的朋友想让我跟着他。

seed_reveal.en: You have been saved! By Wolfgang!
seed_reveal.trans: 你获救了！沃尔夫冈是救星！

idol_reveal.en: You have been saved! By Wolfgang!
idol_reveal.trans: 你获救了！沃尔夫冈是救星！

idol_med.en: Do not fear! Wolfgang will save you!
idol_med.trans: 别害怕，沃尔夫冈会救你！

seed_med.en: Do not fear! Wolfgang will save you!
seed_med.trans: 别害怕，沃尔夫冈会救你！

glass_med.en: Do not fear! Wolfgang will save you!
glass_med.trans: 别害怕，沃尔夫冈会救你！

glass_reveal.en: You have been saved! By Wolfgang!
glass_reveal.trans: 你获救了！沃尔夫冈是救星！

announce_wetter.en: It is like sitting in pond.

announce_otterboat_denbroken.en: Was little den holding whole boat together?
announce_otterboat_denbroken.trans: 是小窝把整条船连在一起的？

announce_mosquitos.en: Wolfgang need blood, get away sucking bugs!
announce_mosquitos.trans: 沃尔夫冈需要血，该死的虫子快滚开！

announce_nodangersleep.trans: 沃尔夫冈喜欢战斗多过睡觉。

announce_worms.en: Earth is tremble beneath Wolfgang's mighty feet!
announce_worms.trans: 大地在沃尔夫冈强劲的脚下颤抖！
